content:
Putting this here too, for anyone that want to use it to Promote the game to friends or in socials.
We prepared a small Promotional Message and Art to share around: 

Morimens is celebrating their 2nd anniversary! There will be 200 free limited banner pulls (guaranteed at least 6 SSR characters, with a minimum of 2 being the Rate-up), a free Limited of your choosing, a new story chapter and character, loads of QoL updates and character buffs!

Morimens is a Lovecraftian card-based gacha RPG that blends strategic deck-building with roguelite-style dungeon crawling. Inspired by Slay the Spire, it provides a well-designed and mechanically-rich gameplay experience that can satisfy players looking for a challenge. 

The game boasts a beautiful art style, is very F2P friendly and respect your time. Made by a small but dedicated team that is always in contact with his community, there is no better time than now to give it a try and celebrate with us!
